'''Tolokus''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==Biography==
In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] Tolokus was ostensibly the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[New Republic Second Fleet|Second Battle Group]]. When the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] required increased New Republic forces in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], Tolokus led [[Task Force Bellbright]] and [[Task Force Token]] to assist the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] in [[Operation Strong Hand]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
